pages.raw_text:
Members and officers of the Spo-
kane painters union declare they
have the best organized body, and
are working under the most agree
able conditions of any labor organ
ization in the city, and perhaps the
state. They boast that there is not
a nonunion paint shop in the city,
and that they have persuaded all
the master painters to sign up for a
closed shop.


Have you given OF promised your
support to the movement for a
night car service and better SER
vice during the day? Do you real
ize what it may mean to you to-
morrow or next week, though you
would be affected neither one way
nor another at the present time by
the establishment of a night SER
vice?


Today you may be working at
a comfortable day job. Jobs are
rather uncertain at this season of
the year, and work is scarce, con-
sequently, perhaps, you will be at
